_publications._publicationTitle: Elucidating Microstructural Alterations in Neurodevelopmental Disorders: Application of Advanced Diffusion-Weighted Imaging in Children With Rasopathies.

_contextSnippet: Significantly lower scores were found for clinical groups compared with TD on all IQ measures (p < 0.010).
resourceName: Wechsler Abbreviated Scale of Intelligence 2nd Edition
details: Significantly lower scores were found for clinical groups (NF1 and NS) compared with TD on all IQ measures (p < 0.010). FSIQ: TD 115 (12.9), NF1 96.5 (13.3), NS 98.5 (13.2); VIQ: TD 116 (13.1), NF1 101 (17.5), NS 102 (15.0); PIQ: TD 110 (17.0), NF1 92.5 (11.5), NS 98.7 (21.6)
